charity.s: BarkBox announced a $10 million in-kind product donation commitment to Greater Good Charities in 2022 and operates a Rescue & Shelter Affiliate Program donating portions of purchases to partner organizations. The company also supports low-cost veterinary care and rescue organizations through its BarkGives program.
charity.focus: Animal rescue/shelter support, low-cost veterinary care, adoption initiatives

environment.s: BarkBox partnered with EcoCart to offset emissions for customer orders as of 2023. However, the company has not published comprehensive sustainability commitments or environmental targets, and sustainability remains an underdeveloped area relative to industry expectations.

labor.s: Employee reviews reveal mixed experiences post-IPO, with some praising dog-friendly office culture and benefits (100% healthcare coverage reported), while others cite mass layoffs, job instability, low compensation relative to workload, and poor management communication. Glassdoor ratings average 3.2/5 in NYC.

dei.s: BarkBox demonstrates pro-DEI positioning with employee reviews noting the company cares about pronouns and maintains inclusive workplace practices. However, a paused Pride ad campaign in 2022 drew criticism, suggesting inconsistent DEI execution.

animals.s: BarkBox products are designed with veterinarian and canine behaviorist oversight and undergo rigorous safety testing. The company leads development of the first international safety standard for dog toys through ASTM and operates an in-house testing lab. Products are generally considered safe with no major recalls reported.

guns.s: BarkBox is a pet subscription service with no connection to firearms.

privacy.s: BarkBox states it will not share personal information with third parties and complies with GDPR and CCPA. However, the company uses third-party payment processors and acknowledges behavioral advertising through partner platforms, creating mixed privacy protection.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
